<watermark>CONSULTANT PATHOLOGIST</watermark>

Dr. Rahul Chandra Bhalla Kanawade  
Consultant Physician  
MBBS, DNB  
F.I.C.G. No. DNB-67743

* CLINICAL CORRELATION IS ESSENTIAL FOR FINAL DIAGNOSIS.  
* MORE THAN 12 HOURS OVERNIGHT FASTING CONDITION IS REQUIRED FOR E.S.R., BLOOD TRIGLYCERIDES, LIPID PROFILE, T3, T4 TSH IRON & HORMONES.  
* HEMOLYZED SERUM MAY FALSELY ELEVATE POSTPRANDIAL SERUM CA, CALCIUM, POTASSIUM, SODIUM, CHLORIDE, URIC ACID, LIPID SERUM MAY FALSELY ELEVATE ALKALINE PHOSPHATASE SGOT, SGPT, LDH AND PHOSPHATASE.  
* THIS REPORT IS FOR THE PERUSAL OF DOCTORS ONLY NOT FOR MEDICOLEGAL CASES.  
* WE USE DISPOSABLE SYRINGES AND NEEDLES ONLY.  

24 HOURS EMERGENCY SERVICES AVAILABLE
